name: Toward Adaptable Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning: An Assumption-Aware Review

description: arXiv:2507.10142v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) has achieved strong performance in simulated benchmarks, yet real deployments often violate the assumptions under which algorithms are designed and evaluated.
